scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CORE,NOTES,ARTIFACTS,TASKS,PROJECTS,UI -c blue,yellow,cyan,green,white,magenta "npm:dev:http --workspace services/workbench-core" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/notes" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/artifacts" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/tasks" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/projects" "npm:dev --workspace ui"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n CORE,NOTES,ARTIFACTS,TASKS,PROJECTS -c blue,yellow,cyan,green,white "npm:dev:http --workspace services/workbench-core" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/notes" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/artifacts" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/tasks" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/projects"
scripts.dev:gateway:stdio: concurrently -k -n CORE_HTTP,NOTES,ARTIFACTS,TASKS,PROJECTS,CORE_MCP -c blue,yellow,cyan,green,white,magenta "npm:dev:http --workspace services/workbench-core" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/notes" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/artifacts" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/tasks" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/projects" "npm:dev:mcp --workspace services/workbench-core"
scripts.dev:native:full: concurrently -k -n CORE,NOTES,ARTIFACTS,TASKS,PROJECTS,UI,TAURI -c blue,yellow,cyan,green,white,magenta,gray "npm:dev:http --workspace services/workbench-core" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/notes" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/artifacts" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/tasks" "npm:dev:http --workspace services/projects" "npm:dev --workspace ui" "npm:tauri:dev --workspace native/desktop"
scripts.build:native: npm run build:web && npm run tauri:build --workspace native/desktop
